channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flypost, 13th July
item.description:
3 flypost posters stuck on wall with cellotape, in between Red Cross and Tan salon.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 177, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flypost, 13th July
item.description:
3 flypost posters stuck on Tesco ATM, with cellotape.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 408, Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London

item.title: Flypost, 13th July
item.description:
1 large flypost half attached to metal bike rack and lying on floor.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Flypost, 13th July
item.description:
1 large flypost attached to tree at this location, opposite Black & Blanc estate agents.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Lime Bike, 13th July
item.description:
1 Lime bike around this location near Citygate Church, on pavement, lying on its side.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime Bikes, 13th July
item.description:
2 Lime bikes at this location, Burrell Row.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burrell Row, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hodge House on Canterbury Road, 13th July
item.description:
Constantly very dirty in this area. Never see a street sweeper here. Litters all over the plants and side of the streets. Foxes poo as well, just not hygiene. Residents here all complaint that there are not public bins in this area even this has been requested ages ago. We felt like living in a rough area. Please do something asap. Thanks.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granville Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked illegally, 13th July
item.description:
This car parked near the fire exit door , on double yellow line . And blocking the fire exit door .

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shepherdess Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nearby foliage is possibly slightly within detect zone of heimdall on pole 7 and possibly causing issue, suggest foliage cut back fro borough, 13th July
item.description:
Nearby foliage is possibly slightly within detect zone of heimdall on pole 7 and possibly causing issue, suggest foliage cut back fro borough
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camden Road, Holloway, Greater London

item.title: Bags dumped by scruffs, 13th July
item.description:
Scruffs have fly tipped rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge on Chart St, 13th July
item.description:
Please pick up the fridge left on Chart St

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Buttesland Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very dark lights not worked for weeks now 2nd time reporting,, 13th July
item.description:
The light does not come on, been like this for weeks and weeks now, is hard to see at night, and also the tree here is cracking the wall, and I feel is damaged the light maybe, really needa a cut lots of bird mess. On the floor seems to be the tree that never gets a cut like all the others.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marden Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 12th July
item.description:
Graffiti on telecoms cabinet (on opposite side of road to 66 Elmstead Lane)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Lane, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip of household items, 12th July
item.description:
Fly tip household items, plywood, plastic laundry bin, white goods
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Emergency access blocked by Abandoned vehicle with multiple penalty notices, 12th July
item.description:
This car has been here for several days and several penalty notices have been attached to it. The key concern however is there’s an emergency situation and Thames Water need access to the sewer via a hatch which is under the car.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alconbury Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree fallen on two cars, 12th July
item.description:
A tree has fallen across the road and landed on two cars on the street. It is also blocking the road on Sussex way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sussex Way, Holloway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tags on Connections shutters, 12th July
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 97, Acre Lane, Stockwell, Greater London

item.title: Gaming Chair dumped on pavement, 12th July
item.description:
Someone has dumped a Gaming chair on the pavement at the junction of Barnehurst Road & Midfield Parade. Please can it be removed. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Barnehurst Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 12th July

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anchor Iron Wharf, Greenwich

item.title: Bins left on pavement for weeks, 12th July
item.description:
Recycling bins are not collected because they have incorrect waste type inside, so they have been left overflowing and on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barnfield Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
